title: Hy2gen Becomes First RFNBO-Certified German E-Methane Producer From Green Hydrogen
content: Hy2gen Deutschland GmbH, the German subsidiary of Hy2gen, has secured certification for its Atlantis plant in Werlte, becoming Germany's first certified producer of Renewable Fuels of Non-Biological Origin (RFNBO) compliant e-methane under the EU's renewable fuel sustainability criteria. The certification, awarded by CertifHy, confirms Atlantis meets EU requirements on sustainability, traceability, and lifecycle emissions. As a result, the plant's renewable hydrogen and e-methane output can now be officially utilized by companies to support industrial decarbonisation and achieve compliance with EU climate regulations.
author: Analysts Account
